entries.description: ICJ Advisory Opinion: Israel's occupation of Palestinian territory including East Jerusalem is unlawful; breaches prohibition on racial discrimination and apartheid; must end occupation, dismantle all settlements, provide reparations and allow return of displaced Palestinians
entries.causation_evidence: International Court of Justice Advisory Opinion on Legal Consequences of Israel's Policies in the Occupied Palestinian Territory (19 July 2024)

entries.description: Gaza military campaign post-Oct 7 2023: over 45,000 Palestinians killed (majority civilians, women and children), 69% of structures destroyed or damaged, widespread famine and water deprivation amounting to acts of genocide per HRW and Amnesty assessments
entries.causation_evidence: UN OCHA Gaza updates, HRW 'Extermination and Acts of Genocide' report (Dec 2024), Amnesty International genocide assessment (Dec 2024)

entries.description: Forced displacement and demolition in West Bank refugee camps (Jenin, Tulkarm, Nur Shams): tens of thousands displaced, neighborhoods systematically destroyed during 'Iron Wall' operation; ethnic cleansing concerns raised by UN
entries.causation_evidence: HRW 'All My Dreams Have Been Erased' report (Nov 2025) and UN human rights office statements

entries.description: Record settlement expansion: over 20,000 new housing units approved since 2023 plus 43 new settlements; ICJ-mandated dismantling ignored
entries.causation_evidence: ICJ Advisory Opinion, Peace Now tracking, UN Human Rights Council settlement reports

entries.description: Over 860 violent settler attacks in West Bank in 2025 alone; systematic failure to protect Palestinian civilians or prosecute offenders
entries.causation_evidence: Amnesty International tracking and UN OCHA reports

entries.description: ICC arrest warrants issued for Prime Minister Netanyahu and Defense Minister Gallant for war crimes and crimes against humanity in Gaza
Ongoing post-ceasefire attacks and denial of humanitarian aid in Gaza despite ICJ orders; continued bombardment and restrictions leading to famine conditions
entries.causation_evidence: UN OCHA updates and HRW reports post-October 2025 ceasefire

entries.description: ICJ-ordered end to occupation and settlement regime ignored; escalation of attacks on civilians and natural resources in Gaza and West Bank post-ruling
entries.causation_evidence: OHCHR expert statements and UN reports on non-compliance with ICJ Advisory Opinion

entries.description: Use of white phosphorus in Gaza and Lebanon operations; documented civilian harm and environmental damage
entries.causation_evidence: HRW and Amnesty International Crisis Evidence Lab reports

entries.description: Mass destruction of housing and civilian infrastructure in Gaza ('domicide'); 69% of structures damaged or destroyed rendering areas uninhabitable
entries.causation_evidence: UN HRC Domicide Report (Feb 2026) and UNOSAT satellite analysis

entries.description: Arbitrary detention and ill-treatment of thousands of Palestinians amounting to torture; ignored ICJ instructions on humanitarian access
entries.causation_evidence: Amnesty International annual report and UN findings

entries.description: Continued West Bank settlement approvals including legalization of 22 outposts and E1 expansion; burying prospects for Palestinian statehood
entries.causation_evidence: Peace Now and UN settlement reports (2025)

entries.description: Ongoing failure to investigate or prosecute alleged war crimes and violations during Gaza operations despite internal and international calls
entries.causation_evidence: Israeli NGO platform reports and UN Commission of Inquiry findings

entries.description: Global leadership in life sciences and health-tech: innovations in trauma care, prosthetics, DNA identification, and emergency medicine deployed domestically and internationally
entries.causation_evidence: Israel Life Sciences and Health-Tech Industry Report 2024-25

entries.description: MASHAV international humanitarian assistance: rapid deployment of medical supplies, trauma care training, and crisis response to countries facing disasters
entries.causation_evidence: MASHAV Activity Report 2024 and official statements
